verses.latin_vulgate: Venit autem Roboam in Jerusalem, et convocavit universam domum Juda et Benjamin, centum octoginta millia electorum atque bellantium, ut dimicaret contra Israël, et converteret ad se regnum suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֣א רְחַבְעָם֮ יְרוּשָׁלַ֒͏ִם֒ וַיַּקְהֵל֩ אֶת־בֵּ֨ית יְהוּדָ֜ה וּבִנְיָמִ֗ן מֵאָ֨ה וּשְׁמוֹנִ֥ים אֶ֛לֶף בָּח֖וּר עֹשֵׂ֣ה מִלְחָמָ֑ה לְהִלָּחֵם֙ עִם־יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל לְהָשִׁ֥יב אֶת־הַמַּמְלָכָ֖ה לִרְחַבְעָֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Roboam came to Jerusalem, and called together all the house of Juda and of Benjamin, a hundred and fourscore thousand chosen men and warriors, to fight against Israel, and to bring back his kingdom to him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin Rehabeam tuli Jerusalemiin, niin hän kokosi Juudan ja BenJaminin huoneen, sata ja kahdeksankymmentä tuhatta valittua sotamiestä, sotimaan Israelia vastaan, saattaaksensa valtakuntaa Rehabeamille jälleen.
verses.king_james: And when Rehoboam was come to Jerusalem, he gathered of the house of Judah and Benjamin an hundred and fourscore thousand chosen men, which were warriors, to fight against Israel, that he might bring the kingdom again to Rehoboam.

verses.latin_vulgate: Factusque est sermo Domini ad Semeiam hominem Dei, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ דְּבַר־יְהֹוָ֔ה אֶל־שְׁמַעְיָ֥הוּ אִישׁ־הָאֱלֹהִ֖ים לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the word of the Lord came to Semeias the man of God, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Herran sana tuli Semajan Jumalan miehen tykö, sanoen:
verses.king_james: But the word of the Lord came to Shemaiah the man of God, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Loquere ad Roboam filium Salomonis regem Juda, et ad universum Israël, qui est in Juda et Benjamin :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱמֹ֕ר אֶל־רְחַבְעָ֥ם בֶּן־שְׁלֹמֹ֖ה מֶ֣לֶךְ יְהוּדָ֑ה וְאֶל֙ כׇּל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל בִּיהוּדָ֥ה וּבִנְיָמִ֖ן לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Speak to Roboam the son of Solomon the king of Juda, and to all Israel, in Juda and Benjamin:
verses.finnish_biblia: Puhu Rehabeamille, Salomon pojalle, Juudan kuninkaalle, ja kaikelle Israelille, jotka Juudassa ja BenJaminissa ovat, sanoen:
verses.king_james: Speak unto Rehoboam the son of Solomon, king of Judah, and to all Israel in Judah and Benjamin, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus : Non ascendetis, neque pugnabitis contra fratres vestros : revertatur unusquisque in domum suam, quia mea hoc gestum est voluntate. Qui cum audissent sermonem Domini, reversi sunt, nec perrexerunt contra Jeroboam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֣ה אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֡ה לֹא־תַעֲלוּ֩ וְלֹא־תִלָּ֨חֲמ֜וּ עִם־אֲחֵיכֶ֗ם שׁ֚וּבוּ אִ֣ישׁ לְבֵית֔וֹ כִּ֧י מֵאִתִּ֛י נִֽהְיָ֖ה הַדָּבָ֣ר הַזֶּ֑ה וַֽיִּשְׁמְעוּ֙ אֶת־דִּבְרֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה וַיָּשֻׁ֖בוּ מִלֶּ֥כֶת אֶל־יָרׇבְעָֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Thus saith the Lord: You shall not go up, nor fight against your brethren: let every man return to his own house, for by my will this thing has been done. And when they heard the word of the Lord, they returned, and did not go against Jeroboam,
verses.finnish_biblia: Näin sanoo Herra: ei teidän pidä nouseman eikä sotiman veljiänne vastaan, vaan palatkaat jokainen kotianne; sillä se on minulta niin tapahtunut. He olivat kuuliaiset Herran sanalle ja palasivat menemästä Jerobeamia vastaan.
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord, Ye shall not go up, nor fight against your brethren: return every man to his house: for this thing is done of me. And they obeyed the words of the Lord, and returned from going against Jeroboam.

verses.latin_vulgate: Habitavit autem Roboam in Jerusalem, et ædificavit civitates muratas in Juda.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֥שֶׁב רְחַבְעָ֖ם בִּירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וַיִּ֧בֶן עָרִ֛ים לְמָצ֖וֹר בִּיהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Roboam dwelt in Jerusalem, and built walled cities in Juda.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Rehabeam asui Jerusalemissa, ja rakensi Juudan kaupungit vahvaksi,
verses.king_james: And Rehoboam dwelt in Jerusalem, and built cities for defence in Judah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exstruxitque Bethlehem, et Etam, et Thecue,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּ֧בֶן אֶת־בֵּֽית־לֶ֛חֶם וְאֶת־עֵיטָ֖ם וְאֶת־תְּקֽוֹעַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he built Bethlehem, and Etam, and Thecue,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja rakensi Betlehemin, Etamin ja Tekoan,
verses.king_james: He built even Beth–lehem, and Etam, and Tekoa,

verses.latin_vulgate: Bethsur quoque, et Socho, et Odollam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־בֵּֽית־צ֥וּר וְאֶת־שׂוֹכ֖וֹ וְאֶת־עֲדֻלָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Bethsur, and Socho, and Odollam,
verses.finnish_biblia: Betsurin, Sokon, ja Adullamin,
verses.king_james: And Beth–zur, and Shoco, and Adullam,

verses.latin_vulgate: necnon et Geth, et Maresa, et Ziph,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־גַּ֥ת וְאֶת־מָרֵשָׁ֖ה וְאֶת־זִֽיף׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Geth, and Maresa, and Ziph,
verses.finnish_biblia: Gatin, Maresan ja Siphin,
verses.king_james: And Gath, and Mareshah, and Ziph,

verses.latin_vulgate: sed et Aduram, et Lachis, et Azeca,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־אֲדוֹרַ֥יִם וְאֶת־לָכִ֖ישׁ וְאֶת־עֲזֵקָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Aduram, and Lachis, and Azecha,
verses.finnish_biblia: Adoraimin, Lakiksen ja Asekan,
verses.king_james: And Adoraim, and Lachish, and Azekah,

verses.latin_vulgate: Saraa quoque, et Ajalon, et Hebron, quæ erant in Juda et Benjamin, civitates munitissimas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־צׇרְעָה֙ וְאֶת־אַיָּל֔וֹן וְאֶ֨ת־חֶבְר֔וֹן אֲשֶׁ֥ר בִּֽיהוּדָ֖ה וּבְבִנְיָמִ֑ן עָרֵ֖י מְצֻרֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Saraa also, and Aialon, and Hebron, which are in Juda and Benjamin, well fenced cities.
verses.finnish_biblia: Zorgan, Ajalonin ja Hebronin, jotka olivat kaikkein vahvimmat kaupungit Juudassa ja BenJaminissa.
verses.king_james: And Zorah, and Aijalon, and Hebron, which are in Judah and in Benjamin fenced cities.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque clausisset eas muris, posuit in eis principes, ciborumque horrea, hoc est, olei, et vini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְחַזֵּ֖ק אֶת־הַמְּצוּר֑וֹת וַיִּתֵּ֤ן בָּהֶם֙ נְגִידִ֔ים וְאֹצְר֥וֹת מַאֲכָ֖ל וְשֶׁ֥מֶן וָיָֽיִן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when he had enclosed them with walls, he put in them governors and storehouses of provisions, that is, of oil and of wine.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki ne vahvaksi ja pani niihin hallitsiat, ja elatuksen varaa, öljyä ja viinaa.
verses.king_james: And he fortified the strong holds, and put captains in them, and store of victual, and of oil and wine.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et in singulis urbibus fecit armamentarium scutorum et hastarum, firmavitque eas summa diligentia, et imperavit super Judam et Benjamin.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְכׇל־עִ֤יר וָעִיר֙ צִנּ֣וֹת וּרְמָחִ֔ים וַֽיְחַזְּקֵ֖ם לְהַרְבֵּ֣ה מְאֹ֑ד וַֽיְהִי־ל֖וֹ יְהוּדָ֥ה וּבִנְיָמִֽן׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Moreover in every city he made an armoury of shields and spears, and he fortified them with great diligence, and he reigned over Juda, and Benjamin,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän toimitti kaikkiin kaupunkeihin kilvet ja keihäät, ja teki ne sangen vahvaksi. Ja Juuda ja BenJamin olivat hänen allansa.
verses.king_james: And in every several city he put shields and spears, and made them exceeding strong, having Judah and Benjamin on his side.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sacerdotes autem et Levitæ qui erant in universo Israël, venerunt ad eum de cunctis sedibus suis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַכֹּֽהֲנִים֙ וְהַלְוִיִּ֔ם אֲשֶׁ֖ר בְּכׇל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל הִֽתְיַצְּב֥וּ עָלָ֖יו מִכׇּל־גְּבוּלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the priests and Levites, that were in all Israel, came to him out of all their seats,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja papit ja Leviläiset kaikesta Israelista tulivat hänen tykönsä kaikista maansa rajoista.
verses.king_james: And the priests and the Levites that were in all Israel resorted to him out of all their coasts.

verses.latin_vulgate: relinquentes suburbana et possessiones suas, et transeuntes ad Judam et Jerusalem : eo quod abjecisset eos Jeroboam et posteri ejus, ne sacerdotio Domini fungerentur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־עָזְב֣וּ הַלְוִיִּ֗ם אֶת־מִגְרְשֵׁיהֶם֙ וַאֲחֻזָּתָ֔ם וַיֵּלְכ֥וּ לִֽיהוּדָ֖ה וְלִירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם כִּֽי־הִזְנִיחָ֤ם יָֽרׇבְעָם֙ וּבָנָ֔יו מִכַּהֵ֖ן לַיהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Leaving their suburbs, and their possessions, and passing over to Juda, and Jerusalem, because Jeroboam and his sons had cast them off, from executing the priestly office to the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Leviläiset hylkäsivät esikaupunkinsa ja saamansa ja tulivat Juudaan ja Jerusalemiin; sillä Jerobeam ja hänen poikansa ajoivat heidät pois, ettei he olisi saaneet tehdä Herralle papin palvelusta.
verses.king_james: For the Levites left their suburbs and their possession, and came to Judah and Jerusalem: for Jeroboam and his sons had cast them off from executing the priest’s office unto the Lord:

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui constituit sibi sacerdotes excelsorum, et dæmoniorum, vitulorumque quos fecerat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּֽעֲמֶד־לוֹ֙ כֹּֽהֲנִ֔ים לַבָּמ֖וֹת וְלַשְּׂעִירִ֑ים וְלָעֲגָלִ֖ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשָֽׂה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he made to himself priests for the high places, and for the devils, and for the calves which he had made.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta hän asetti papit itsellensä kukkuloille ja perkeleille, ja vasikoille, jotka hän tehdä antoi.
verses.king_james: And he ordained him priests for the high places, and for the devils, and for the calves which he had made.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et de cunctis tribubus Israël, quicumque dederant cor suum ut quærerent Dominum Deum Israël, venerunt in Jerusalem ad immolandum victimas suas coram Domino Deo patrum suorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַֽחֲרֵיהֶ֗ם מִכֹּל֙ שִׁבְטֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל הַנֹּֽתְנִים֙ אֶת־לְבָבָ֔ם לְבַקֵּ֕שׁ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל בָּ֚אוּ יְר֣וּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם לִזְבּ֕וֹחַ לַֽיהֹוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֥י אֲבוֹתֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Moreover out of all the tribes of Israel, whosoever gave their heart to seek the Lord the God of Israel, came into Jerusalem to sacrifice their victims before the Lord the God of their fathers.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja monta kaikista Israelin sukukunnista, jotka sydämestänsä etsivät Herraa Israelin Jumalaa, tulivat heidän perässänsä Jerusalemiin, uhraamaan Herralle isäinsä Jumalalle,
verses.king_james: And after them out of all the tribes of Israel such as set their hearts to seek the Lord God of Israel came to Jerusalem, to sacrifice unto the Lord God of their fathers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et roboraverunt regnum Juda, et confirmaverunt Roboam filium Salomonis per tres annos : ambulaverunt enim in viis David et Salomonis, annis tantum tribus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְחַזְּקוּ֙ אֶת־מַלְכ֣וּת יְהוּדָ֔ה וַֽיְאַמְּצ֛וּ אֶת־רְחַבְעָ֥ם בֶּן־שְׁלֹמֹ֖ה לְשָׁנִ֣ים שָׁל֑וֹשׁ כִּ֣י הָלְכ֗וּ בְּדֶ֧רֶךְ דָּוִ֛יד וּשְׁלֹמֹ֖ה לְשָׁנִ֥ים שָׁלֽוֹשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they strengthened the kingdom of Juda, and established Roboam the son of Solomon for three years: for they walked in the ways of David and of Solomon, only three years.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vahvistivat Juudan valtakunnan, ja vahvistivat Rehabeamin Salomon pojan kolmena ajastaikana; sillä he vaelsivat Davidin ja Salomon tietä kolme ajastaikaa.
verses.king_james: So they strengthened the kingdom of Judah, and made Rehoboam the son of Solomon strong, three years: for three years they walked in the way of David and Solomon.

verses.latin_vulgate: Duxit autem Roboam uxorem Mahalath filiam Jerimoth filii David : Abihail quoque filiam Eliab filii Isai,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּֽקַּֽח־ל֤וֹ רְחַבְעָם֙ אִשָּׁ֔ה אֶת־מָ֣חֲלַ֔ת (בן) [בַּת־]יְרִימ֖וֹת בֶּן־דָּוִ֑יד אֲבִיהַ֕יִל בַּת־אֱלִיאָ֖ב בֶּן־יִשָֽׁי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Roboam took to wife Mahalath, the daughter of Jerimoth the son of David: and Abihail the daughter of Eliab the son of Isai.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Rehabeam otti Mahelatin, Jerimotin Davidin pojan tyttären, emännäksensä, niin myös Abihailin, Eliabin tyttären, Isain pojan,
verses.king_james: And Rehoboam took him Mahalath the daughter of Jerimoth the son of David to wife, and Abihail the daughter of Eliab the son of Jesse;

verses.latin_vulgate: quæ peperit ei filios Jehus, et Somoriam, et Zoom.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֵּ֥לֶד ל֖וֹ בָּנִ֑ים אֶת־יְע֥וּשׁ וְאֶת־שְׁמַרְיָ֖ה וְאֶת־זָֽהַם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they bore him sons Jehus, and Somorias, and Zoom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka hänelle synnytti nämät pojat: Jeuksen, Semarian ja Sahamin.
verses.king_james: Which bare him children; Jeush, and Shamariah, and Zaham.

verses.latin_vulgate: Post hanc quoque accepit Maacha filiam Absalom, quæ peperit ei Abia, et Ethai, et Ziza, et Salomith.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַחֲרֶ֣יהָ לָקַ֔ח אֶֽת־מַעֲכָ֖ה בַּת־אַבְשָׁל֑וֹם וַתֵּ֣לֶד ל֗וֹ אֶת־אֲבִיָּה֙ וְאֶת־עַתַּ֔י וְאֶת־זִיזָ֖א וְאֶת־שְׁלֹמִֽית׃
verses.douay_rheims: And after her he married Maacha the daughter of Absalom, who bore him Abia, and Ethai, and Ziza, and Salomith.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitte otti hän Maekan, Absalomin tyttären, joka hänelle synnytti Abian, Attain, Sisan ja Selomitin.
verses.king_james: And after her he took Maachah the daughter of Absalom; which bare him Abijah, and Attai, and Ziza, and Shelomith.

verses.latin_vulgate: Amavit autem Roboam Maacha filiam Absalom super omnes uxores suas et concubinas : nam uxores decem et octo duxerat, concubinas autem sexaginta : et genuit viginti octo filios, et sexaginta filias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֶּאֱהַ֨ב רְחַבְעָ֜ם אֶת־מַעֲכָ֣ה בַת־אַבְשָׁל֗וֹם מִכׇּל־נָשָׁיו֙ וּפִ֣ילַגְשָׁ֔יו כִּ֠י נָשִׁ֤ים שְׁמוֹנֶֽה־עֶשְׂרֵה֙ נָשָׂ֔א וּפִֽילַגְשִׁ֖ים שִׁשִּׁ֑ים וַיּ֗וֹלֶד עֶשְׂרִ֧ים וּשְׁמוֹנָ֛ה בָּנִ֖ים וְשִׁשִּׁ֥ים בָּנֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Roboam loved Maacha the daughter of Absalom above all his wives and concubines: for he had married eighteen wives, and threescore concubines: and he begot eight and twenty sons, and threescore daughters.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Rehabeam piti Maekan, Absalomin tyttären, rakkaampana kaikkia muita emäntiänsä ja jalkavaimojansa; sillä hänellä oli kahdeksantoistakymmentä emäntää ja kuusikymmentä jalkavaimoa, ja hän siitti kahdeksankolmattakymmentä poikaa ja kuusikymmentä tytärtä.
verses.king_james: And Rehoboam loved Maachah the daughter of Absalom above all his wives and his concubines: (for he took eighteen wives, and threescore concubines; and begat twenty and eight sons, and threescore daughters.)

verses.latin_vulgate: Constituit vero in capite Abiam filium Maacha ducem super omnes fratres suos : ipsum enim regem facere cogitabat,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲמֵ֨ד לָרֹ֧אשׁ רְחַבְעָ֛ם אֶת־אֲבִיָּ֥ה בֶֽן־מַעֲכָ֖ה לְנָגִ֣יד בְּאֶחָ֑יו כִּ֖י לְהַמְלִיכֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But he put at the head of them Abia the son of Maacha to be the chief ruler over all his brethren: for he meant to make him king,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Rehabeam asetti Abian, Maekan pojan, veljeinsä pääksi ja hallitsiaksi; sillä hän mieli tehdä hänen kuninkaaksi.
verses.king_james: And Rehoboam made Abijah the son of Maachah the chief, to be ruler among his brethren: for he thought to make him king.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia sapientior fuit, et potentior super omnes filios ejus, et in cunctis finibus Juda et Benjamin, et in universis civitatibus muratis : præbuitque eis escas plurimas, et multas petivit uxores.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֩בֶן֩ וַיִּפְרֹ֨ץ מִכׇּל־בָּנָ֜יו לְֽכׇל־אַרְצ֧וֹת יְהוּדָ֣ה וּבִנְיָמִ֗ן לְכֹל֙ עָרֵ֣י הַמְּצֻר֔וֹת וַיִּתֵּ֥ן לָהֶ֛ם הַמָּז֖וֹן לָרֹ֑ב וַיִּשְׁאַ֖ל הֲמ֥וֹן נָשִֽׁים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because he was wiser and mightier than all his sons, and in all the countries of Juda, and of Benjamin, and in all the walled cities: and he gave them provisions in abundance, and he sought many wives.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki toimellisesti ja jakoi poikansa Juudan ja BenJaminin maahan kaikkiin vahvoihin kaupunkeihin, ja antoi heille yltäkyllä viljaa, ja havitteli monta emäntää.
verses.king_james: And he dealt wisely, and dispersed of all his children throughout all the countries of Judah and Benjamin, unto every fenced city: and he gave them victual in abundance. And he desired many wives.
